case_title: PREMIER COMPUTER SYSTEM VS KAM, ERIC DBA NOVA DONA INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PREMIER COMPUTER SYSTEM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAM, ERIC  DBA NOVA DONA INC. $415.28 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $436.28 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KAM, ERIC  DBA NOVA DONA INC. HEARING SET FOR JUL-15-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
CERTIFIED MAIL TO ERIC KAM RETURNED SIGNED.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM ERIC KAM WITH INFORMATION THAT CORPORATION NOVADONA FILED CHAPTER 7-BANKRUPTCY.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KAM, ERIC  DBA NOVA DONA INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $150.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $43.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT KAM, ERIC  DBA NOVA DONA INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $33.67 AS TO DEFENDANT KAM, ERIC  DBA NOVA DONA INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $415.28 FILED BY PREMIER COMPUTER SYSTEM AS TO DEFENDANT KAM, ERIC  DBA NOVA DONA INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-15-1997, DENIED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KAM, ERIC  DBA NOVA DONA INC.
